Appearances via Zoom Conference
Shirley Bridwell, Esq., FORD, WALKER, HAGGERTY & BEHAR (562) 983-2500 sbridwell@fwhb.com
No other appearnces.

Not contested. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WILLIAM BROOKS' Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint.

Brooks' unopposed motion for leave to file a cross-complaint is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
